category_sources: Official MiniZinc Handbook describes MiniZinc modeling, tools, and language reference at https://docs.minizinc.dev/en/stable/.
source_facts.description says MiniZinc is a medium-level constraint modeling language.
display_name_sources: Official project homepage and handbook use the MiniZinc capitalization.
docs_sources: Official MiniZinc documentation domain hosts the MiniZinc Handbook with tutorial, user manual, and language reference.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/MiniZinc/libminizinc, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official MiniZinc Handbook covers modeling, the MiniZinc tool chain, and language reference.
